availability_assumptions.available_ts_rule: feature.available_ts = timestamp from union of per-instrument OHLCV available_ts values
availability_assumptions.cross_instrument_rule: asynchronous rows are aligned as-of and never by future wall-clock rows
availability_assumptions.session_context: session_label remains point-in-time metadata for reset and split logic
availability_assumptions.source_ts_rule: all source_available_ts values must be <= feature.available_ts

duplicate_or_equivalent_exposure_notes.summary: P13 locked FeaturePack and LabelPack inventory checked; no locked pack member resolves this P15 gap item.

formula_sketch.alignment_rule: ES/NQ/RTY rows align by as-of available_ts; no leg may use source rows after output available_ts
formula_sketch.missingness_rule: missing, late, stale, or no_trade legs produce gaps or flags rather than forward-fill or backfill
formula_sketch.state_rule: residual, relative/catch-up, divergence, and agreement states are derived from completed-bar returns only
